_comment: Parameters for the scored 'Beat rho' arena, rendered by site/build.py. The reference rows are mathematical constants computed exactly from n (the bits=40 official-tier group order) — never hand-typed. The record, score-history, and trajectory come from the measured runs in results.tsv (mean group-ops, lower is better). A new benchmark row in results.tsv updates the board, record, and chart automatically.

references.name: Generic floor
references.sub: √(n/2) · Shoup bound on the expected score
